name: wxcode-admin-sterling-bankops
title: Sterling Bank Ops Admin
description: Retail banking back-office operations dashboard — sober slate-blue and emerald palette, left sidebar with branch switcher, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards, an approvals queue, a transactions table, a risk/exceptions panel, and an inline SVG throughput chart. Designed for trust and clarity.

query.en: Build me a retail banking back-office operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with branch switcher, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards (pending approvals, transactions today, flagged items, SLA met %), an approvals queue with Approve/Reject actions, a transactions table, a risk/exceptions side panel, and an inline SVG throughput chart.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a retail banking back-office operations admin dashboard — left sidebar with branch switcher, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards, an approvals queue with Approve/Reject actions, a transactions table, a risk/exceptions side panel, and a throughput chart.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
